quote.text: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
quote.author: John Muir

fun_fact.text: Hungarian paprika, the country's most famous spice, comes in eight different grades ranging from delicate and sweet to fiery hot. The town of Szeged in southern Hungary is considered the paprika capital of the world, where the spice has been cultivated since the 16th century and is celebrated with an annual festival each October.

short_read.title: How Harbor Seals Sleep in the Water Without Drowning
short_read.teaser: Harbor seals, like those along the Strait of Juan de Fuca, have a remarkable ability to sleep underwater by resting only half their brain at a time. This fascinating adaptation lets them stay safe from predators while getting the rest they need.

medium_read.title: The Secret Language of Flowers: Victorian Garden Meanings
medium_read.teaser: In the Victorian era, every flower carried a specific meaning, allowing people to send coded messages through their bouquets. From roses expressing love to lavender symbolizing devotion, discover the charming language that made gardens conversation pieces.

long_read.title: The Lost Art of Letter Writing: How Correspondence Shaped History
long_read.teaser: Before phones and email, letters were the only way to maintain relationships across distances, creating a rich archive of human connection. This fascinating exploration reveals how famous letter writers from Jane Austen to Albert Einstein poured their hearts, ideas, and dreams onto paper.

port_angeles.title: Bald Eagles Along Ediz Hook
port_angeles.description: Ediz Hook, the natural sand spit protecting Port Angeles Harbor, is a wonderful spot for watching bald eagles year-round. These magnificent birds nest in the area and can often be seen perched on driftwood or soaring over the Strait, hunting for fish. Early morning visits offer the best viewing opportunities.

puzzle_1.question: A hummingbird's heart beats approximately ___ times per minute during flight.
puzzle_1.correct_response: Amazing! You're absolutely right — that tiny heart is working incredibly hard during flight!
puzzle_1.close_response: You're very close! A hummingbird's heart beats about 1,200 times per minute when flying — that's 20 times per second!
puzzle_1.wrong_response: Those tiny hearts are truly remarkable! A hummingbird's heart beats about 1,200 times per minute during flight — that's faster than we can even imagine!
puzzle_1.learn_more_text: To power their incredibly fast wing beats (up to 80 times per second), hummingbirds have the fastest metabolism of all animals. At rest, their heart rate slows to about 250 beats per minute to conserve energy.

puzzle_2.question: Which Hungarian word means 'hello' or 'goodbye' and is used as a friendly greeting?
puzzle_2.correct_response: Szia! You got it! This is one of the most common friendly greetings in Hungarian — perfect for friends and family.
puzzle_2.wrong_response: The answer is 'Szia' (pronounced SEE-ah) — it's the casual, friendly way to say both hello and goodbye in Hungarian, like 'ciao' in Italian!
puzzle_2.learn_more_text: Hungarian is part of the Finno-Ugric language family, making it quite different from neighboring European languages. 'Szia' comes from 'szolga' meaning servant, originally meaning 'I am your servant' as a polite greeting.

puzzle_3.question: What type of tree produces acorns that are an important food source for Olympic Peninsula wildlife?
puzzle_3.correct_response: Perfect! Oak trees produce acorns that feed deer, squirrels, jays, and many other animals on the Olympic Peninsula — they're like nature's grocery store!
puzzle_3.wrong_response: It's oak trees that produce acorns! Garry oaks grow in parts of the Olympic Peninsula and their acorns have fed wildlife for thousands of years.
puzzle_3.learn_more_text: Garry oak, also called Oregon white oak, is the only native oak in Washington State and was historically important to Indigenous peoples who managed oak groves and harvested acorns. These beautiful trees can live for 500 years.

game.title: Bubble Shooter
game.description: A relaxing bubble puzzle game — aim and pop matching colored bubbles. Easy to pick up, fun to play!
